name: pacer-mcp
description: Pacer revenue-management API as MCP tools: portfolios, pacing, market metrics, Guesty, briefs.
long_description: Exposes the Pacer (pacer/core) revenue-management platform as MCP tools for Claude Desktop. Revenue managers can ask natural-language questions about portfolio pacing vs prior year, market metrics, Guesty pricing/promotion config, and client-health briefs without leaving Claude. Requires a Pacer personal access token (pat_...) issued via the core CLI.

pacer_core_token.title: Pacer Core Token
pacer_core_token.description: Personal access token (pat_...) issued via `pacer pat create`. Requires the employee role or higher.

pacer_core_url.title: Pacer Core URL
pacer_core_url.description: Base URL of the pacer/core app (PAT JSON API is mounted here). Leave as the default for production.
